Playable story build

Rumours of the Mist

Escape through a living ruin where the mist watches every move. This build adds a real Chapter 1 flow, enemy attack feedback, upgraded ambience, and full game screens for loading and pause.

Chapter 1 — Broken Entrance

The entrance seals behind the group. A fragment of the ruins pulls you away into the first mist corridor. Collect Natural Energy symbols, resist fear, survive the living mist, and reopen the broken exit.

  • 3D mist corridor exploration
  • Enemy attack feedback and chase tension
  • Ambient drone + heartbeat tension audio
  • Pause, loading, and story intro screens
Loading mission

Entering the Ruins

Preparing Chapter 1, aligning Natural Energy, and listening for the mist.

Rumours of the Mist

Escape — V2 Mist Corridor

V2 Mist Corridor Build

Choose your character first. This enhanced build now uses the upgraded character art and a darker ritual-stone Mist Corridor inspired by the latest concept visuals. You still keep the same playable movement, symbols, enemy mist, torch, and exit objective.

Controls: W/↑ forward, S/↓ backward, A/← turn left, D/→ turn right, Q/E strafe, F torch, M mini-map, R restart.
Mouse/touch drag turns camera. Audio starts after Start Game.

Story mission

Chapter 1

Broken Entrance

The ruins have sealed behind you. The corridor ahead is only a fragment of something much larger. Gather the Natural Energy symbols, keep fear under control, and find the broken exit before the living mist reaches you.
